name: paper-figure-tools
description: Codex skills for reproducible AI/systems paper figure workflows.

interface.longDescription: Paper Figure Tools helps Codex set up reproducible AI/systems paper figure workflows with editable draw.io diagrams, Matplotlib and SciencePlots plotting code, vector exports, and regeneration commands.
defaultPrompt: Use $paper-figure-workflow to set up editable diagrams and publication plots.
Review this research repo's figure pipeline and make it reproducible.
